era: 1989-1996 core, E=6 focus on later material. Psychedelic evolution. Far Gone (1993), Confusion Au Go-Go (1995). Sub Pop to Atlas/Mercury.
associated_musicians: Presidents of the United States of America (Jason Finn)

theory_nodes.concept: Return appearance: degree 221 (E=5) to degree 233 (E=6). Energy increment earned by heavier, denser later material. The psychedelic evolution.
theory_nodes.description: Love Battery's second appearance documents the mature psychedelic identity.

theory_nodes.concept: Confusion Au Go-Go (1995) as psychedelic statement. Fillmore/Au Go-Go reference in title. Most experimental Love Battery record. E=6 fully realized.
theory_nodes.description: The mature Love Battery at maximum psychedelic commitment.

theory_nodes.concept: Psychedelic rock tradition: Blue Cheer to Spacemen 3 to Love Battery. The fuzz-reverb matrix. Dense, immersive, spacious-yet-heavy.
theory_nodes.description: Love Battery's lineage in the broader psychedelic tradition.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 debut. U-District. Sub Pop. First appearance at FIRST ACCIPITRIDAE pair.
E=6 continues. Classic Rock. Wilson sisters. Different genre, same energy band.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=5 Merlin + E=6 Love Battery = E=11. Compact, concentrated energy: rapid ki-ki-ki chatter + dense fuzz-reverb guitar. Both small but assertive. FALCON CLOSE (3rd).

milestones: E=5 to E=6 energy rise across appearances
